title: ResearchVerifyResponse
description: Structured response from LLM research verification.

verdict.description: Overall verdict: VERIFIED if all claims check out, ISSUES_FOUND if any claim is disputed or unverifiable.

claim.description: Brief description of the claim being evaluated.

status.description: Evaluation result: verified (supported and accurate), disputed (contradicts facts or other findings), unverifiable (no citation or illegitimate source).

detail.description: Explanation of why the claim received this status.
